pulses.name: Django Multiple Vulnerabilities
pulses.description:
Two vulnerabilities have been identified in Django {Python-based open-source web framework}, leading to XSS and DoS attacks.

How it can be Exploited
CVE-2022-22818: The cross-site scripting vulnerability exists in Django due to improper validation of user-supplied input.
